overall.description: A maritime simulation game depicting nighttime navigation from a ship's bridge during a thunderstorm. The vessel moves through choppy waters while three navigation monitors display radar, chartplotter, and sonar data, with occasional lightning illuminating the ocean surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigating stormy harbor waters at night

events.description: lightning strike illuminates the ocean surface on the starboard side

agents.ego_description: piloting the vessel through rough seas while monitoring the navigation displays

entered.detail: colorful chartplotter display showing harbor map with depth contours
circular radar display with rotating sweep showing surrounding contacts
blue sonar display showing water depth and bottom structure
bow of the ship with railings and deck equipment visible through the bridge windows
metal safety railing along the port side of the foredeck
metal safety railing along the starboard side of the foredeck
choppy dark water with visible wave patterns and whitecaps
brief bright electrical discharge illuminating the distant water surface

segments.scene_description: The ship's bridge view shows the vessel cruising through dark, stormy waters at night. Three illuminated navigation monitors provide radar, chart, and sonar data while the bow cuts through choppy waves. A sudden lightning flash briefly lights up the starboard side ocean surface around the 14-second mark.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a continuous view from a ship's bridge as it navigates through a dark, turbulent ocean during a nighttime storm. It begins with the vessel cruising through choppy waters, where the dim environment is punctuated by the glow of three illuminated navigation monitors displaying radar, chart, and sonar data. As the bow cuts through the heavy waves, the oppressive darkness of the sea remains dominant. The scene then shifts abruptly when a sudden flash of lightning streaks across the sky, momentarily illuminating the starboard side of the ocean surface in a brilliant burst of light.
